caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid dark gray background, speaking toward the camera. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved top featuring small red floral patterns and an embroidered neckline, paired with a dark beaded necklace. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to the front of her shirt. In the lower-left corner of each scene, a small logo is visible with the text "NPTEL". Across the sequence of images, the woman remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with her head and mouth. Her facial expressions shift naturally as she talks, with her eyes and mouth moving to form words, though her overall posture and the static background remain consistent throughout the clip.
